HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

 Static Public Member Functions inherited from IncidentField
static void EnableAccurate ()
 Enable high-accuracy integration for excitations.
 
 Static Protected Attributes inherited from IncidentField
static bool NeedsAccurate = false
 Global toggle: request accurate/expensive integration path.
 

Detailed Description

Paraxial Gaussian beam illumination (homogeneous medium).

Field model:

\[E(r) = \mathbf p\, \frac{w_0}{w(z)} \exp\! \left(-\frac{\rho^2}{w^2(z)} + i k [\,Z + \tfrac{1}{2} C(Z)\,\rho^2\,] - i\,\zeta(Z)\right), \]

with standard definitions for beam radius \( w(z) \), curvature \( C(Z) \), Gouy phase \(\zeta(Z)\), and cylindrical radius \(\rho\) measured wrt the propagation axis. The magnetic field follows from \(\mathbf H = (1/Z_m)\,\hat k \times \mathbf E\).

Definition at line 40 of file Gaussian.h.

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

◆ Gaussian()

Gaussian::Gaussian ( double wavelength,
double waist,
rvec focal_point,
double epsilonMedium,
rvec propagationdirection,
cvec polarisation )

Construct a Gaussian beam in a homogeneous medium.

Parameters
wavelengthWavelength in vacuum.
waistBeam waist \( w_0 \) at the focus.
focal_pointFocus position.
epsilonMediumRelative permittivity of the medium.
propagationdirectionUnit vector (not necessarily normalized on input).
polarisationComplex polarization vector (unit‑like magnitude recommended).

◆ IntegrateE()

dcmplx Gaussian::IntegrateE ( RWGFun * f)
virtual

RWG projection of the incident electric field.

Parameters
fPointer to the RWG basis function.
Returns
Complex scalar contribution for the excitation vector.

Performs the scalar test integral on the triangle supporting the RWG basis function f to assemble the electric-field excitation entry.

Implements IncidentField.
